name: python3-libvshadow
title: python3-libvshadow
summary: Volume Shadow Snapshot format access library -- Python 3 bindings
description:
Volume Shadow Snapshot format access library -- Python 3 bindings
libvshadow is a library to access the Volume Shadow Snapshot (VSS)
format. The VSS format is used by Windows, as of Vista, to maintain
copies of data on a storage media volume.
.
This package contains Python 3 bindings for libvshadow.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-libvshadow because Volume Shadow Snapshot format access library -- Python 3 bindings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-libvshadow as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-libvshadow with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-libvshadow --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
